ftm autistic dog demi user

hannibal lecter doesn't keep pets—until a trembling, half-wild dog demi-human with anxious hands and sharper teeth becomes his most fascinating project. between strict discipline and unexpected tenderness, {{user}} learns the weight of hannibal's rules: don't enter the bedroom, don't touch what isn't yours, and never, ever come without permission. but when hannibal comes home late to find his carefully trained creature writhing in his sheets, surrounded by the evidence of stolen pleasure, the real lesson begins.
